title: Slimes Of Kathare
description: Adds new and colorful slime variants to the game along with new blocks and items.
body:
Adds New Colorful Slimes and Slime Block Variants!

Requires Fabric API

This Mod is a WIP so most features have yet to come. This mod adds new colors of slimes. These new slimes drop new colors of slime balls which can be used to craft new items such as slime tools and armor. Slime world generation such as slime trees is also added. The mod now even allows for the slime blocks to work with pistons!

How To Install:
- Download Fabric
- Run Fabric Setup with the Minecraft Launcher closed
- Download Fabric API and put it in your .minecraft\mods folder
- Download Katharine Slime Mod and put it in your .minecraft\mods folder

Credit to Comicshadowlord for the music on some of the slime discs.
